properties.title: Többen meghaltak, miután tűz ütött ki egy antwerpeni tízemeletes lakóházban
properties.summary: A tűz súlyosságára tekintettel a tűzoltóság a legmagasabb szintű operatív irányítást léptette érvénybe.

properties.title: Az új Almodóvar-film nyomokban régi Almodóvart is tartalmaz – kritika a Keserű karácsonyról
properties.summary: El lehet-e vállalni egy 200 ezer eurós haknit? Elismerésbe csomagolt szitokszó-e a kultfilm? Pedro Almodóvar saját magával kekeckedik, a 76 éves mester most csak félig veszi komolyan magát. Többet is bennfenteskedhetett volna.

properties.title: A paksi atomerőmű felesleges hőjét használnák a fővárosi távfűtéshez
properties.summary: A Budapesti Közművek és a műszaki egyetem közös projektben vizsgálja, hogyan lehetne a fővárosra is kiterjeszteni a Pakson már évtizedek óta bevált modellt, amivel a most jobbára csak gondot jelentő erőművi melegedésből hasznot lehetne húzni. A vezeték Dunaújváros, Százhalombatta és Érd számára is szolgáltathatna hőenergiát.

properties.title: Hatalmas tűz ütött ki a Hortobágyi Nemzeti Parkban
properties.summary: Tizenegy helyről vonultak ki a tűzoltók a területre, amely harminc-negyven hektáron ég.

properties.title: Kiszivárgott pár videó az iPhone 18 Próról, az Apple tűzzel-vassal próbálja lekapni őket a netről
properties.summary: Súlyos következménye lett az Apple egyik partnerét ért kibertámadásnak: kiszivárgott pár videófelvétel az ősszel érkező iPhone 18 Pro modell egyik tesztjéről. A jelek szerint a cég igyekszik mindenhonnan leradírozni a videót.

properties.title: Kigyulladt egy tízemeletes ház Antwerpenben, többen meghaltak
properties.summary: A lakóház nyolcadik emeletén keletkezett tűzben legalább öten életüket vesztették, többen megsérültek.

properties.title: Bekövetkezett, amitől sokan tartottak: majdnem öngyilkosságba hajszolta a kiszolgáltatott felhasználót a ChatGPT
properties.summary: Pert indított az OpenAI és vezérigazgatója, Sam Altman ellen egy 34 éves kaliforniai férfi, a San Franciscó-i bíróságra benyújtott kereset szerint a ChatGPT súlyosbította a férfi bipoláris zavarát, és egy mániás epizódot hetekig tartó téveszmévé fokozva végül öngyilkossági kísérletbe hajszolta a felhasználót.

properties.title: Vádat emelt a német ügyészség egy ukrán állampolgár ellen a rejtélyes gázvezeték-robbantás ügyében
properties.summary: A német szövetségi ügyészség vádat emelt egy ukrán állampolgár ellen az Északi Áramlat gázvezetékek ellen elkövetett robbantásos merénylet miatt – számolt be szerdán több német sajtóorgánum, köztük az ARD, a Süddeutsche Zeitung és a Die Zeit. A nevet nem említik, korábban egy Szerhij Kuznyecov néven azonosított 49 éves férfit adtak át a német hatóságoknak.

properties.title: Chișinăul aprobă noul acord cu România pentru podul peste Prut care va lega Republica Moldova de Autostrada Unirii
properties.summary: Republica Moldova și România fac un nou pas pentru realizarea podului rutier de la Ungheni peste Prut. Guvernul de la Chișinău a aprobat un nou acord privind proiectul care va asigura conexiunea cu Autostrada Unirii A8 și va aduce primii kilometri de autostradă construiți în Republica Moldova.

properties.title: Trafic reluat pe DN1, după restricțiile impuse din cauza riscului de prăbușire a unui stâlp pe Pasarela Ikea
properties.summary: Brigada Rutieră a Capitalei a anunțat restricții temporare de trafic pe DN1, în București, pentru prevenirea unui posibil risc de prăbușire a unui stâlp de iluminat public și pentru a permite intervenția echipajelor IGSU. Traficul a fost reluat după aproximativ două ore.

properties.title: De ce s-a inundat Capitala: explicațiile directorului adjunct al Apa Nova după precipitațiile record de marți noapte
properties.summary: Ploaia din noaptea de marți spre miercuri poate fi încadrată în categoria evenimentelor care apar statistic aproximativ o dată la 40 de ani, afirmă directorul general adjunct al Apa Nova, Alexandru Moldovan, care spune că intensitatea precipitațiilor a depășit cu mult capacitatea proiectată a rețelei de canalizare.

properties.title: O maşină de poliţie aflată în misiune a fost implicată într-un accident rutier în Năvodari
properties.summary: O maşină de poliţie aflată în misiune a fost implicată miercuri după-amiază într-un accident rutier produs la Năvodari, în judeţul Constanţa. În urma evenimentului nu au fost persoane rănite.

properties.title: Cutremurele succesive din Venezuela au distrus aproape 60.000 de clădiri și au lăsat în urmă tone de moloz
properties.summary: Peste 58.000 de clădiri ar fi putut fi avariate și distruse de cele două cutremure care au lovit Venezuela săptămâna trecută, potrivit unei analize preliminare a datelor satelitare, care sugerează că amploarea distrugerilor ar putea depăși cu mult estimările oficiale, scrie The Guardian.

properties.title: Japonia și India caută căi de colaborare în domeniile economic și militar. Premierul Sanae Takaichi a ajuns pentru o vizită de trei zile la New Delhi
properties.summary: Prim-ministrul Japoniei, Sanae Takaichi, a sosit miercuri la New Delhi pentru a se întâlni cu omologul său Narendra Modi, într-o vizită de trei zile care se aşteaptă să se concentreze pe subiecte precum securitatea economică şi energetică şi pe abordarea influenţei Chinei în regiune, informează EFE, transmite Agerpres.

properties.title: Byty místo nacistického bunkru? Berlín řeší, co s pozůstatkem Hitlerovy kanceláře
properties.summary: V Berlíně se řeší spor kvůli plánované demolici jednoho z posledních pozůstatků po centru moci nacistického vůdce Adolfa Hitlera. Podzemní bunkr, který zůstal po bývalé Nové říšské kanceláři, by mohl být odstraněný kvůli výstavbě nových bytů a kanceláří.

properties.title: Co mají dělat lidé při bouřce na planině? ‚Držte se od sebe, dřepněte si na jednu nohu,‘ radí meteorolog
properties.summary: Pět dětí, které v noci na středu zasáhl na letním táboře na Jindřichohradecku blesk, zůstává v nemocnici. Jejich zdravotní stav je stabilizovaný, zasažený dospělý člověk zůstává v nemocnici na pozorování. Podle záchranné služby blesk udeřil do stromu a odtud zasáhl sekundární výboj děti a dospělého ve stanech. „Stromy fungují jako hromosvod, za bouřky se musíme držet dál,“ popisuje meteorolog z Českého hydrometeorologického ústavu Filip Smola.

properties.title: Pożar przy torach zatrzymał pociągi. "Liczne źródła ognia"
properties.summary: Płonęły trawy i nieużytki wzdłuż torów kolejowych pod Mińskiem Mazowieckim. Strażacy prowadzili działania w kilku punktach. Ruch pociągów Kolei Mazowieckich na linii do Siedlec został wstrzymany na kilka godzin.

properties.title: LSM valde un darbinieki apņemas meklēt kompromisu zīmolu jautājumā – pagaidām nākotne neskaidra
properties.summary: Kāds būs Latvijas Radio un Latvijas Televīzijas vēsturisko zīmolu turpmākais liktenis? Vai Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija (LSM) valde nepieciešamības gadījumā būs gatava atzīt kļūdu un uzņemties atbildību? Šie ir tikai pāris no daudziem jautājumiem, ko trešdien, 1. jūlijā, Sabiedriskā medija darbinieki uzdeva valdes priekšsēdētājai Baibai Zūzenai. Tikšanās notika pēc tam, kad daļa Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija darbinieku publiskā vēstulē aicināja saglabāt tautā iemīļotos nosaukumus Latvijas Televīzija un Latvijas Radio līdzās Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija – LSM – zīmolam.

properties.title: Vārtsargs Gustavs Dāvis Grigals bildinājis savu mīļoto
properties.summary:
View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Dzidra (@dzidrasurganova)
Latvijas vīriešu ledus hokeja izlases vārtsargs Gustavs Dāvis Grigals bildinājis savu draudzeni Dzidru Surganovu, vēsta pāra "Instagram".

properties.title: What Was Leaked After the Cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži? Cert.lv Explains
properties.summary:
So far, the attacker has leaked 44 gigabytes of data stolen during the cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), although the total volume of data potentially obtained is likely to be much larger, according to Latvia’s national cybersecurity incident response institution, Cert.lv. According to the institution, the leaked data mainly consists of internal documents, email […]

properties.title: Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia
properties.summary:
A Riga City Court has sentenced an electrician to five years and six months in prison for spying on behalf of Russia’s military intelligence agency (GRU). The court also imposed one year and eight months of probation supervision following his release, without confiscation of property, the LETA news agency has learned. According to the prosecution, […]

The post Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections
properties.summary:
The leaders of the For Stability! party’s candidate lists for Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections will be Svetlana Čulkova, Pāvels Kuzmins, Natālija Marčenko-Jodko, Ludmila Rjazanova, and Igors Orlovs, according to the LETA news agency. Čulkova, who leads the dissolved For Stability! parliamentary group, will head the party’s list in the Riga constituency. Running second on the […]

The post Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns
properties.summary:
The recent cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), in which a hacker managed to breach the company’s IT systems and gain control over data, demonstrates that Latvia’s strategic infrastructure remains relatively vulnerable to such attacks, Minister for Smart Administration and Regional Development Edgars Tavars said in an interview with TV3 on Friday. The minister called […]

The post Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia
properties.summary:
Some eastern parts of Latvia may see light rain on Friday, while light northerly winds will prevail across most of the country, according to the Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre. Daytime temperatures will rise to 22–27°C, while areas along the Gulf of Riga coast will remain a few degrees cooler. Over the weekend and […]

The post Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings
properties.summary:
Most members of Riga City Council’s leadership saw their public approval ratings decline during the first half of this year, according to the latest survey conducted by research company SKDS on behalf of the Riga City Council. Only three politicians improved their popularity in May compared with November last year. The sharpest decline was recorded […]

The post Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia
properties.summary:
Another oil depot has caught fire in Russia’s Krasnodar region following overnight Ukrainian drone strikes, according to Russian and Ukrainian media reports. The Ukrainian Telegram channel Exilenova+ reported that three fuel storage tanks caught fire at the oil depot in the village of Poltavskaya after the attack. According to the Telegram channel Astra, the Poltavskaya […]

The post Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Zelensky: If attacks continue, Moscow will burn
properties.summary:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has said that the intensive drone attacks on Russian territory are a response to the strike on a historic monastery in Kyiv, and that Moscow will also burn if the attacks continue, Reuters reports. A large number of drones were sent to Moscow on the night of the 18th of June, […]

The post Zelensky: If attacks continue, Moscow will burn appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Court rejects MEP's campaign expenses challenge
properties.summary: Tallinn Administrative Court has dismissed European Parliament member Jaak Madison's appeal seeking to overturn an order by the Political Parties Financing Surveillance Committee requiring him to repay campaign expenses.

properties.title: Photos: Trolleybus services return to Tallinn
properties.summary: Trolleybuses have reappeared on the streets of Tallinn after a break of over a year and a half, with service restored on Wednesday.

properties.title: Minister: Police conducting raids near schools to catch e‑scooter offenders
properties.summary: Estonian police have conducted raids near schools in Tallinn suburbs to curb rising e-scooter accidents among 7–14-year-olds, the only demographic seeing increased injuries during the first five months of 2026.

properties.title: Tallinn's Pirita beach tests positive for blue-green algae
properties.summary: The Health Board detected both non-toxic and toxic species of blue-green algae in water samples taken Wednesday at the Pirita beach swimming area.

properties.title: Gallery: Tallinn Linnahall grand tapestry renovation begins
properties.summary: Conservation work began Monday on artist Enn Põldroos' 41-year-old tapestry "Lives of People" at Tallinn Linnahall. The work is expected to be completed by the end of July.

properties.title: Tartu looking to ban sale of bottled alcohol after 10 p.m.
properties.summary: Tartu has unveiled a preliminary nightlife strategy through 2035 aimed at making the city's nightlife safer. The plan calls for restricting the sale of bottled alcohol after 10 p.m. and increasing the nighttime presence of police officers and security personnel.

properties.title: INTERVJUU ⟩ Ain Hanschmidt: ei ole nii, et raha on s*taks!
properties.summary: Infortari turuväärtus hingab LHV Grupi kuklasse, et muutuda Tallinna börsi väärtuslikumaks ettevõtteks. Aktsia hinna vaatamise kõrvalt otsitakse palehigis uusi investeerimisvõimalusi. Mõnes mõttes on Baltikumis juba raske hea hinnaga häid varasid leida. Kui sõda saaks läbi ning poliitikud võtaks ja täidaks suuri eesmärke, läheks majanduses paremini, rääkis Infortari juhatuse esimees Ain Hanschmidt.

properties.title: AK ⟩ «Õnne 13» – hakklihakastme filosoofia
properties.summary: Kunagi lehes suvereporterina ametis olles saabus uudis, et Urmas Lennukist saab uus «Õnne 13» stsenarist. Pidin siis Lennukile helistama ja küsima. Telefon võeti vastu. Soovisin kõigepealt õnne. Tänati. Uurisin siis, millised on plaanid ja üldse kuidas edasi, sellised stammküsimused. Hääl torus hakkas rääkima, rääkis pikalt ja ehk isegi mõnuga, oli näha, et on asjade üle mõelnud ja tunneb teemat. Mõnele täpsustavamale küsimusele tulid vastused aga kuidagi tõrksalt. Liiga tõrksalt, et tegu võiks olla vastse stsenaristiga. Täpsustasin, et kellega siis ikka õigupoolest tegu on. Telefoni otsas polnud mitte Lennuk, vaid keegi juhuslik mees. Olin eksinud numbriga. Üks asi jäi mind siiski tänase päevani painama: miks mees õnnesoovide peale tänas? Aga ju siis viisakusest.

properties.title: Amserv avas Ott Tänaku hoones hiigelesinduse. Tänak: tugevad tulevad mõõnadest läbi
properties.summary: Amserv avas 1. juulil Tallinna lennujaama lähistel uue Toyota esinduskeskuse hoones, mille omanik on autoralli maailmameister Ott Tänak.
